pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py both reference this name; consistent with iDempiere naming conventions

iDempiere documentation confirms 'Standard Order' is a standard document type with associated print formats (https://wiki.idempiere.org/en/Plugin:_Alt_OrderLine); search results confirm print formats for Standard Order exist and can be copied
Task description specifies changing header title to 'PROPOSAL'; export_result.sh script verifies this by checking for PrintName='PROPOSAL' or Name='PROPOSAL' in AD_PrintFormatItem table

iDempiere C_OrderLine table uses 'Line' as the column name for line numbers (confirmed via MOrderLine model and database schema patterns); this is standard across all line tables in iDempiere; export_result.sh correctly searches for items with Name='Line' or Name='Line No' and checks IsPrinted field

Verified via iDempiere API documentation and source code: C_Order is the standard table for orders with AD_Table_ID=259; export_result.sh script joins AD_PrintFormat with AD_Table on AD_Table_ID to retrieve TableName and confirms result contains 'order' (case-insensitive)

privileged_info_summary: The task involves customizing print formats in iDempiere, an open-source ERP system. The task creates a new print format named 'Customer Proposal' by copying the existing 'Standard Order' format (which targets the C_Order table). The format modification involves: (1) changing the header text from 'Standard Order' to 'PROPOSAL', and (2) hiding the 'Line' column by unchecking its 'Printed' checkbox in the Format Item tab. These are standard iDempiere operations that operate on real GardenWorld demo database tables and standard print formats. The IsPrinted='N' setting in the AD_PrintFormatItem table controls column visibility in print outputs.
